title: Error parsing SystemVerilog struct accessor within case statements
body:
Failure with "failed to detect width for identifier" when parsing struct accessors within switch statements.

## Steps to reproduce the issue

Smallest breaking example:
```systemverilog
typedef struct packed {
    logic a;
} mystruct;

module top();
    mystruct s;
    always @(*) case(s.a)
        default: begin end
    endcase
endmodule
```

Version output:
```bash
$ yosys --version
Yosys 0.9+4081 (git sha1 862e84eb, clang 6.0.0-1ubuntu2 -fPIC -Os)
```

## Expected behavior

No compilation error. Support for packed struct is assumed from the README:

> [...] packed structs and unions are supported.

## Actual behavior

Error produced incorrectly
```
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: hs32_decode.sv
Parsing SystemVerilog input from `hs32_decode.sv' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
hs32_decode.sv:7: ERROR: Failed to detect width for identifier \s.a!
```
code_blocks:
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: hs32_decode.sv
Parsing SystemVerilog input from `hs32_decode.sv' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
hs32_decode.sv:7: ERROR: Failed to detect width for identifier \s.a!
